base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemies_unused_variants — a character (enemy_group) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Unused enemy sprites at sheet bottom. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
